title: euphrasia montana var. hirtella
intro: Euphrasia montana var. hirtella, also known as Eyebright, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Euphrasia montana var. hirtella include its ability to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Eyebright can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are commonly used to treat a range of health conditions, including eye infections and allergies.
